name: Kindergarten Fashion & Textile Design — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for designing an outfit collage, repair ideas, and respectful choices. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with designing an outfit collage, repair ideas, and respectful choices.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.
